user.title: Connect to cTrader
user.description:
Before setting up this integration:

1. Register an application at https://openapi.ctrader.com
2. Select Read-Only permissions
3. Generate an Access Token in the portal
4. Find your Account ID in cTrader platform settings

Then enter your credentials below.

error.invalid_auth:
Invalid access token or account ID. Check that:
- Token is valid and not expired
- Token has Read permissions enabled
- Account ID is correct

abort.already_configured: This cTrader account is already configured
